languages.text: "Нелепица! Вас отправил Диодас, не так ли? Рассчитывали посеять раздор между мной и дочерью? Вы плохо подготовились, {name}".

traits.locale_text: "Нелепица! Вас отправил Диодас, не так ли? Рассчитывали посеять раздор между мной и дочерью? Вы плохо подготовились, {name}".

languages.text: "This is ridiculous! Diodas sent you, didn't he? Were you hoping to sow discord between me and my daughter? You should have come better prepared, {name}. "
languages.original_text: "Нелепица! Вас отправил Диодас, не так ли? Рассчитывали посеять раздор между мной и дочерью? Вы плохо подготовились, {name}".

traits.locale_text: "This is ridiculous! Diodas sent you, didn't he? Were you hoping to sow discord between me and my daughter? You should have come better prepared, {name}. "
"This is ridiculous! Diodas sent you, didn't he? Were you hoping to sow discord between me and my daughter? You should have come better prepared, {name}. "
"This is ridiculous! Diodas sent you, didn't he? Were you hoping to sow discord between me and my daughter? You should have come better prepared, {name}. "

languages.text: "Das ist lächerlich! Ihr kommt von Diodas, oder? Hattet Ihr vor, Zwietracht zwischen mir und meiner Tochter zu säen? Da müsst Ihr schon früher aufstehen, {name}. "
languages.original_text: "This is ridiculous! Diodas sent you, didn't he? Were you hoping to sow discord between me and my daughter? You should have come better prepared, {name}. "

traits.locale_text: "Das ist lächerlich! Ihr kommt von Diodas, oder? Hattet Ihr vor, Zwietracht zwischen mir und meiner Tochter zu säen? Da müsst Ihr schon früher aufstehen, {name}. "

languages.text: “这太荒唐了！是狄奥达斯派你来的吧？想挑拨我和我女儿之间的关系？那你应该准备得更充分些，{name}。”
languages.original_text: "This is ridiculous! Diodas sent you, didn't he? Were you hoping to sow discord between me and my daughter? You should have come better prepared, {name}. "

traits.locale_text: “这太荒唐了！是狄奥达斯派你来的吧？想挑拨我和我女儿之间的关系？那你应该准备得更充分些，{name}。”

languages.text: « C'est ridicule ! Diodas vous envoie, n'est-ce pas ? Espériez-vous semer la discorde entre ma fille et moi ? Vous auriez dû mieux vous préparer, {name}.  »
languages.original_text: "This is ridiculous! Diodas sent you, didn't he? Were you hoping to sow discord between me and my daughter? You should have come better prepared, {name}. "

traits.locale_text: « C'est ridicule ! Diodas vous envoie, n'est-ce pas ? Espériez-vous semer la discorde entre ma fille et moi ? Vous auriez dû mieux vous préparer, {name}.  »

languages.text: «¡Eso es ridículo! Le envía Diodas, ¿verdad? ¿Acaso esperaba sembrar cizaña entre mi hija y yo? Debería haberse preparado mejor para esto, {name}».
languages.original_text: "This is ridiculous! Diodas sent you, didn't he? Were you hoping to sow discord between me and my daughter? You should have come better prepared, {name}. "

traits.locale_text: «¡Eso es ridículo! Le envía Diodas, ¿verdad? ¿Acaso esperaba sembrar cizaña entre mi hija y yo? Debería haberse preparado mejor para esto, {name}».

languages.text: "Bu çok saçma! Diodas gönderdi seni, değil mi? Kızımla arama nifak tohumları ekmeyi mi umuyorsun? Daha iyi hazırlanıp gelmeliydin {name}."
languages.original_text: "This is ridiculous! Diodas sent you, didn't he? Were you hoping to sow discord between me and my daughter? You should have come better prepared, {name}. "

traits.locale_text: "Bu çok saçma! Diodas gönderdi seni, değil mi? Kızımla arama nifak tohumları ekmeyi mi umuyorsun? Daha iyi hazırlanıp gelmeliydin {name}."

languages.text: 「これはおかしな話だ！ディオダスが君を送ったんだろう？君、私と娘の間に仲たがいを売ろうとしていたのか？もっと準備して来なさいよ、{name}。」
languages.original_text: "This is ridiculous! Diodas sent you, didn't he? Were you hoping to sow discord between me and my daughter? You should have come better prepared, {name}. "

traits.locale_text: 「これはおかしな話だ！ディオダスが君を送ったんだろう？君、私と娘の間に仲たがいを売ろうとしていたのか？もっと準備して来なさいよ、{name}。」
